stage1_general.name: PIWM-Stage1-UserIntent-v1
stage1_general.corpus_role: general user-intent and action-conditioned next-state world modeling

stage2_target_5act.name: PIWM-Stage2-Target-5Act-v1
stage2_target_5act.qa_status: video_backed_synthetic_train; balanced 5-act test is project-lead QA-reviewed pass

joint_baseline.name: PIWM-Stage1PlusStage2-Target5Act-v1
joint_baseline.corpus_role: joint SFT ablation for the revised two-stage story

target_promptready.name: PIWM-Target-PromptReady-v1
target_promptready.corpus_role: future target-frontcam generation queue; not current multimodal training data

stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_v2.name: PIWM-Stage2-Target-5Act-GreetAug-v2
stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_v2.corpus_role: Stage-2 prelaunch patch with 15 synthetic general-domain attention-stage Greet rows and stage-conditioned candidate lists
stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_v2.qa_status: canonical target train remains video-backed synthetic; 15 Greet augmentation rows are synthetic_augmented_unreviewed
stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_v2.recommended_use: Use as next Stage-2 A0-A4 input after Path C health check; keep v1 and canonical 71-row files as audit baselines.

joint_baseline_greet_aug_v2.name: PIWM-Stage1PlusStage2-Target5Act-GreetAug-v2
joint_baseline_greet_aug_v2.corpus_role: joint SFT ablation using the balanced Stage-2 Greet augmentation v2 patch

joint_baseline_greet_aug_v2_targetx8.name: PIWM-Stage1PlusStage2-Target5Act-GreetAug-v2-TargetX8
joint_baseline_greet_aug_v2_targetx8.corpus_role: A4 weighted joint SFT ablation; target 5-act rows repeated 8x

stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_audit_v1.name: PIWM-Stage2-Target-5Act-GreetAug-v1
stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_audit_v1.corpus_role: Superseded Stage-2 prelaunch patch with 40 Greet rows; retained for audit only.
stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_audit_v1.qa_status: canonical target train remains video-backed synthetic; 40 Greet augmentation rows are synthetic_augmented_unreviewed
stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_audit_v1.recommended_use: Audit artifact only; replaced by stage2_target_5act_greet_aug_v2 after Claude review.

joint_baseline_greet_aug_audit_v1.name: PIWM-Stage1PlusStage2-Target5Act-GreetAug-v1
joint_baseline_greet_aug_audit_v1.corpus_role: Superseded joint SFT artifact using GreetAug-v1; retained for audit only.

evaluation_matrix.purpose: Stage-1 health check on general QA: AIDA macro F1, intent accuracy, next-stage accuracy.
Zero-shot target transfer on the balanced 5-act target-frontcam test.
Low-resource target specialization gain under 5-act macro F1 and go/no-go precision/recall.
Catastrophic forgetting check on general Stage-1 evaluation.

red_lines: Do not report Reassure inside the main 5-act macro F1; Greet/Elicit/Inform/Recommend/Hold is the current locked operational 5-act set.
Do not use action-selection prompts that expose gold reward, risk, benefit, predicted_next_stage, or next_state.
Do not use the 200 PIWM-Target-PromptReady-v1 video-pending rows as multimodal SFT data until Kling videos and sampled frames exist.
Do not report real-50 or salesperson-majority-vote results until those assets and labels exist.
Recommend must preserve pressure=soft|firm in action params; Reassure must be zero in Stage-2 train, target eval, inference, and runtime export.
The balanced 30-record 5-act target test is project-lead QA-reviewed pass; do not extend that QA claim to the 71 Stage-2 train records or the full 118-record target corpus.

hold_prior_calibration.formula: subtract lambda * log(observed_hold_prior / target_hold_prior) from Hold candidate label token logits
hold_prior_calibration.observed_hold_prior: 16/30 from Path C quick target probe
